active_authority_chain.role: Canonical product homes and readiness anchors
Current program lock and founder success test
Machine-buildable twin for one objective, not read by this candidate session
Measured result, not authority unless synced and fresh

history_only_sources: docs/projects/AMENDMENT_* as product behavior source before product home

hard_checks.name: No second queue
hard_checks.rule: Any active scheduler, runner, readiness, or improvement path must read builderos-reboot/BP_PRIORITY.json for product work and must not activate MISSION_QUEUE.json.

hard_checks.name: Product home first
hard_checks.rule: Runtime/product context must load PRODUCT_REGISTRY -> PRODUCT_HOME -> FILE_MANIFEST before amendment history.

hard_checks.name: Point B governs closure
hard_checks.rule: Current Point B mission cannot be marked complete unless POINT_B_TARGET mission founder_success_test is satisfied and founder_usability_pass is true.

hard_checks.name: Blueprint before build
hard_checks.rule: CDR/Builder may execute only frozen blueprint steps or true platform GAP-FILL. Unauthorized product, UX, architecture, scope, priority, or acceptance decisions return blocked.

hard_checks.name: Receipt is not live truth
hard_checks.rule: Receipts support claims only when fresh against source registry hashes, BP/Point B hashes, commit SHA, and deploy SHA where applicable.

hard_checks.name: Deploy truth wins
hard_checks.rule: Railway runtime deploy SHA and live behavior probes override local commit, origin/main, acceptance receipt, and narrative success.

hard_checks.name: Founder surface is first-class
hard_checks.rule: Founder UI failures on /overlay/lifeos-app.html founder path must be promoted into acceptance corpus and block UI_ALPHA_GATE until fixed.

hard_checks.name: Certification lock
hard_checks.rule: PROJECT_CERTIFICATION.FULLY_MACHINE_READY must remain false until same-tier determinism, closure acceptance, deploy truth, and founder UI proof all pass.

may_do: apply exact file changes specified by ARC
perform true platform GAP-FILL when the builder path is missing or broken and the gap is receipted
must_not_decide: whether a generic probe can override a founder failure
whether deploy lag is acceptable for PASS
